title: Ubiquiti PrismAP-5-30, (Horn-5-30) Symmetrical sector 5GHz antenna, 19dBi, 30°
description: The isolation antennas are interchangeable and feature high-performance beam patterns for a range of demanding deployment needs. Combined with the PrismStation 5AC or IsoStation radio, the system gets maximum gain out of the smallest footprint 30°version offer breakthrough scalability options for wireless systems. Unique beam performance and great co-location characteristics allow for a higher density of sectors than traditional sector technology
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Polarization VH, Slant (+- 45 °) VSWR < 1,7 Cross-Pol Isolation [dB] 17 Wireless frequency 5 GHz Elevation beam width (-6dB) [°] 30 Azimuth beam width (-6dB) [°] 30 Antenna type Sector Antenna gain [dBi] 19 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors IsoStation port Physical characteristics Wind load [km/h] 200 Purpose Outdoor Weight [kg] 1,1 Width [mm] 221 Height [mm] 221 Depth [mm] 184
